zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp是Hugh de Runchamp的兒子，於1118年出生在英國爾赫爾斯。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1190年在英國爾諾維其享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp是Hugh de Runchamp的儿子，于1118年出生在英国爾赫爾斯。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1190年在英国爾諾維其享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp was born in 1118, in Hulse, Cheshire, England as the son of Hugh de Runchamp. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1190, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp est né en 1118, à Hulse, Cheshire, Angleterre, fils de Hugh de Runchamp. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1190, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp wurde 1118 in Hulse, Cheshire, England, als Sohn von Hugh de Runchamp geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Northwich, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp è nato il nel 1118 nel Hulse, Cheshire, England come figlio di Hugh de Runchamp. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1190, nel Northwich, Cheshire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.Hulse, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアハルゼ
ja.Northwich, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchampは1118年にイギリスチェシュアイアハルゼでHugh de Runchampの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1190年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp(은)는 1118년 영국 체실르 훌스에서 Hugh de Runchamp의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1190년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp nasceu em 1118, em Hulse, Cheshire, Inglaterra filho de Hugh de Runchamp. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1190, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp родился в 1118 г. в местности хулс, чешир, Англия. Его отца звали Hugh de Runchamp. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1190 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Runchamp nació en 1118, en Hulse, Cheshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Hugh de Runchamp. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1190, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
